name.description: The name of the receipt rule

rule_set_name.description: The name of the receipt rule set

enabled.description: Whether the receipt rule is enabled

recipients.description: The recipients of the receipt rule

scan_enabled.description: If true, incoming emails will be scanned for spam and viruses

after.description: The name of the rule to place this rule after

tls_policy.description: The TLS policy to apply to the receipt rule

add_header_action.description: Configuration block for the add header action
add_header_action.type: list(object({header_name: string, header_value: string, position: number}))

bounce_action.description: Configuration block for the bounce action
bounce_action.type: list(object({message: string, sender: string, smtp_reply_code: string, status_code: string, topic_arn: string, position: number}))

lambda_action.description: Configuration block for the lambda action
lambda_action.type: list(object({function_arn: string, invocation_type: string, topic_arn: string, position: number}))

s3_action.description: Configuration block for the S3 action
s3_action.type: list(object({bucket_name: string, iam_role_arn: optional(string), position: number, topic_arn: optional(string), kms_key_arn: optional(string), object_key_prefix: optional(string)}))

sns_action.description: Configuration block for the SNS action
sns_action.type: list(object({topic_arn: string, position: number, encoding: string}))

stop_action.description: Configuration block for the stop action
stop_action.type: list(object({scope: string, topic_arn: string, position: number}))

workmail_action.description: Configuration block for the workmail action
workmail_action.type: list(object({organization_arn: string, position: number, topic_arn: string}))
